name: Collect Em All! Clear the Dots
core_loop: Connect matching colored balls to clear them from the board, achieve specific level goals within a limited number of moves, and progress through increasingly difficult stages.
audience_proxy: Casual mobile gamers of all ages, leaning slightly female, looking for a relaxing yet visually satisfying puzzle experience.
visual_style: Bright, colorful, and clean 2D aesthetic with soft 3D shading on the interactive game pieces.

palette.description: A clean white play area framed by a prominent blue top bar and a warm orange bottom banner, featuring vibrant, highly saturated colors for the game pieces.

screenshot_signals: top UI bar displaying level goals and remaining moves
explosive visual effects for rocket power-ups
promotional text banners at the bottom of the screen
mini-game interface with dice and paths
